briefdescription.para: This function sends 'XILINX' to SHA-3 module for hashing.

detaileddescription.para: The purpose of this function is to illustrate how to use the XSecure_Sha3 driver.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - SHA-3 hash successfully generated for given input data string.
XST_FAILURE - if the SHA-3 hash failed.

briefdescription.para: This function sends 'XILINX' to SHA-2 module for hashing.

detaileddescription.para: The purpose of this function is to illustrate how to use the XSecure_Sha2 driver.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - SHA-2 hash successfully generated for given input.
XST_FAILURE - if the SHA-2 hash failed.//! [SHA2 example]

briefdescription.para: This function prints the given hash on the console.

detaileddescription.para: Hash Pointer to the hash buffer

briefdescription.para: This function prints the given hash on the console.

detaileddescription.para: Hash Pointer to the hash buffer

briefdescription.para: Main function to call the SecureShaExample.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if the SHA calculation is successful.
XST_FAILURE if the SHA calculation failed.
XST_FAILURE if the SHA calculation failed.
